events.title: Charles River Loop → Tatte
events.location: Tatte Bakery & Café, 1003 Beacon St, Brookline, MA 02446
events.description: 14 flat miles along the Charles, coffee and shakshuka at the end. BlueBikes very welcome — we regroup at every bridge.

events.title: Minuteman Bikeway to Lexington
events.location: Diesel Café, 257 Elm St, Somerville, MA 02144
events.description: Meet at Diesel for cold brew, then the whole Minuteman out to Lexington center and back. Bring a lock.
